raw_consumer_statement:
I reported fraudulent charges on my credit card in XX/XX/2025. The bank sent me a letter confirming I was not responsible and that all related charges and fees would be removed. While the fraudulent transactions were taken off, they left a late fee and interest charge that resulted directly from the fraud. 

Since then, instead of correcting the error, the bank has lowered my credit line twice first by {$5600.00} in XX/XX/2025, and now down to just {$250.00} as of XX/XX/2025. Both times they cited delinquency, but the only reason my account appeared delinquent was because of the unresolved fraud charges they had already confirmed I was not responsible for. 

This has dragged on for months with no resolution. It has been stressful, unfair, and has harmed my credit by slashing my available limit.
